scripts.pretest:
node --input-type=module -e "import {existsSync} from 'node:fs'; if(!existsSync('node_modules/@playwright/test')){console.error('
[gloxx pretest] @playwright/test missing - run npm install first.
  This usually means you are in a fresh git worktree where node_modules has not been restored.
'); process.exit(1)}"
